subcodes.first_line: The Book Manifest hath been sent down from God, the Lord of all worlds, unto him who claspeth fast His mighty and enduring cord. Within the Prison it maketh mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب مبین نزل من الله رب العالمین لمن تمسک بحبله المحکم المتین یذکر فی السجن
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @living waters; water of life
